overview: AV Online Services is a professional multi-page business website for a digital services shop offering Aadhaar, PAN card, printing, lamination, and online application services. Features a hero section, services grid, special offer banner, WhatsApp integration, and business hours display — all in a clean blue, white, and gold brand theme.
features: Multi-page website with Home, About, Services, and Contact pages
Hero section with special offer banner for PAN Card and Aadhaar services
Services grid showcasing Aadhaar, PAN Card, Printing, Lamination, and more
WhatsApp floating button on every page
Business hours display with open/closed indicator
SEO meta tags with local keywords
Mobile-responsive blue, white, and gold brand design
